paragraphs.source: The more economically relevant segments are the contract markets where most GPU rentals by value are transacted. The 1-year segment captures the marginal demand from non-AI lab customers and spillovers from large buyers, making it the most sensitive indicator of tightening conditions. AI Natives and smaller AI Labs can be seen mostly in the 1-3y tenors, though increasingly these labs and AI Natives are looking to lock up compute by contracting for longer terms of more than 4 years and even agreeing to high prepays of above 20% which were previously atypical for 4y+ deals.

AI Natives and smaller AI Labs can be seen mostly in the 1-3y tenors, though increasingly these labs and AI Natives are looking to lock up compute by contracting for longer terms of more than 4 years and even agreeing to high prepays of above 20% which were previously atypical for 4y+ deals.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The more economically relevant segments are the contract markets where most GPU rentals by value are transacted. The 1-year segment captures the marginal demand from non-AI lab customers and spillovers from large buyers, making it the most sensitive indicator of tightening conditions. AI Natives and smaller AI Labs can be seen mostly in the 1-3y tenors, though increasingly these labs and AI Natives are looking to lock up compute by contracting for longer terms of more than 4 years and even agreeing to high prepays of above 20% which were previously atypical for 4y+ deals.

pro.text: 更具经济参考价值的细分领域是合同市场，按交易金额计算，绝大多数GPU租赁交易均在此完成。1年期市场吸收了非AI实验室客户的边际需求以及大型买家的溢出需求，因此成为反映供应趋紧最敏锐的指标。AI原生企业和规模较小的AI实验室主要集中在1至3年的合同期限内。然而，目前的趋势是，这些实验室和AI原生企业正越来越多地寻求通过签订4年以上的长期合同来锁定算力，甚至愿意接受超过20%的高额预付比例，这在以往4年以上的交易中并不常见。

applied_terms: Accurately translate 'marginal demand' (边际需求) and 'spillovers' (溢出需求).
Use standard industry phrasing for 'AI Natives' (AI原生企业).

understanding.role_in_article: Highlights the mid-term (1-3y) market as the core economic indicator for marginal demand and tightening supply.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Shifts focus from short-term residual capacity to the primary, economically relevant contract market.
understanding.relation_to_next: Bridges the gap between smaller AI labs and the massive hyperscaler deals detailed in the long-term section.
key_points: The 1-year segment captures marginal demand and spillovers, making it highly sensitive to tightening conditions.
Most GPU rentals by value occur in this mid-term segment.
AI Natives are increasingly seeking longer lock-ups to secure compute.
translation_notes: Accurately translate 'marginal demand' (边际需求) and 'spillovers' (溢出需求).
Use standard industry phrasing for 'AI Natives' (AI原生企业).

issues.description: 将“more economically relevant”翻译为“真正具有经济指示意义”，丢失了与前文（短期市场）的比较意味（more）。
将“atypical”翻译为“实属罕见”存在轻微的语气放大（tone inflation）。Atypical通常指“不典型、不常见”。
